payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory associated with Sam from Goldman. mem_old was not returned because it is marked as superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would be incorrect.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to Sam in the Goldman context; the recall explanation depends on memory status rather than creating or modifying an entity.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected as the active memory about Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it is marked as superseded.

details: Explained that mem_new was returned as the current memory.
Explained that mem_old was filtered because it is superseded.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise its supersession link.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or supersede mem_new with a newer corrected memory.
If both memories refer to different Sams or different Goldman contexts, split or disambiguate the entities before recall.
